TITLE: Auto-moderation

LOG_CHANNEL.LABEL: Log Channel
LOG_CHANNEL.HELP: The channel where AutoMod logs will be sent

MAX_STRIKES.LABEL: Maximum Strikes
MAX_STRIKES.HELP: Number of strikes before a user is punished

ACTION.LABEL: Action on Max Strikes
ACTION.HELP: The action to take when a user reaches the maximum number of strikes

DEBUG_MODE.LABEL: Debug Mode
DEBUG_MODE.HELP: Don't moderate messages from moderators (for testing)

ANTI_GHOSTPING.LABEL: Anti Ghost-Ping
ANTI_GHOSTPING.HELP: Log and moderate ghost pings (deleted mentions)

ANTI_MASSMENTION_THRESHOLD.LABEL: Mass-Mention Threshold
ANTI_MASSMENTION_THRESHOLD.HELP: Number of mentions before a message is considered mass-mention

ANTI_ATTACHMENTS.LABEL: Anti-Attachments
ANTI_ATTACHMENTS.HELP: Automatically delete messages with file attachments

ANTI_INVITES.LABEL: Anti-Invites
ANTI_INVITES.HELP: Automatically delete messages with Discord invites

MAX_LINES.LABEL: Maximum Lines
MAX_LINES.HELP: Delete messages with more lines (0 = disabled)

WHITELISTED_CHANNELS.LABEL: Whitelisted Channels
WHITELISTED_CHANNELS.HELP: Channels where AutoMod is not active (Ctrl+Click for multi-select)

INFO.TITLE: Info
INFO.DESC: AutoMod protects your server from spam, unwanted links and mass mentions.

STEP1.TITLE: 1. Setup Log Channel
STEP1.DESC: Select a channel where AutoMod logs should appear

STEP2.TITLE: 2. Configure Strike System
STEP2.DESC: Set how many strikes a user can receive before being punished

STEP3.TITLE: 3. Enable Anti Features
STEP3.DESC: Activate desired protection features (Anti-Spam, Anti-Links, etc.)

STEP4.TITLE: 4. Adjust Limits
STEP4.DESC: Optional: Set limits for line length and mentions

TIP.TITLE: 💡 Tip
TIP.DESC: Enable Debug Mode to test settings without affecting moderators

WHITELIST.TITLE: Whitelisting
WHITELIST.SUBTITLE: Exceptions & Exemptions
WHITELIST.ROLE_WHITELIST_DESC: Coming soon: Exclude specific roles from AutoMod (e.g. Moderators, Trusted Members)

RAID.TITLE: Raid Protection
RAID.SUBTITLE: Raid Protection & Join Spam
RAID.FEATURE_1: Join Spam Detection (X users in Y seconds)

LOGS_DESC: The channel where the bot has to send automod logs
STRIKES_DESC: The maximum amount of strikes a user can have before being punished
ACTION_DESC: The action to take when a user reaches the max amount of strikes
LOG_EMBED_DESC: The color of the embeds sent in the logs channel
DM_EMBED_DESC: The color of the embeds sent in the DMs of the punished user
WHITELIST_CH_DESC: The channels where the bot won't moderate
DEBUG_DESC: Skip moderating messages sent by moderators
INVITES_DESC: Automatically delete messages with discord invites
SPAM_DESC: Automatically delete messages that are considered spam
MASSMENTION_DESC: Automatically moderate messages with mass mentions
MASSMENTION_THRES_DESC: The amount of mentions a message must have to be considered a mass mention
MAXLINES_DESC: Automatically delete messages with more than the specified amount of lines
